services.name: marimo-init
command:
mkdir -p /data && if [ ! -f /data/requirements.txt ]; then cat <<'EOF' > /data/requirements.txt
marimo[recommended]
EOF
fi && if [ ! -f /data/app.py ]; then cat <<'EOF' > /data/app.py
import marimo

app = marimo.App()


@app.cell
def __():
    import marimo as mo
    return (mo,)


@app.cell
def __(mo):
    mo.md(
        """
        # Welcome to marimo

        This starter notebook lives in `/app/app.py`.

        Edit it in the browser, then use `marimo run app.py` when you want to serve it as an app.
        """
    )
    return


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run()
EOF
fi && chown -R 1000:1000 /data
